use_cases: Confirming account or data deactivation actions
Asking user confirmation before destructive operations
Displaying warning messages for irreversible changes
Replacing browser confirm dialogs with styled alternatives
Managing user preferences with deactivation options
ai_summary: A confirmation dialog component designed for deactivation workflows, featuring a destructive action warning with AlertTriangle icon. Built with Radix UI Dialog primitives for accessibility and includes a comprehensive button variant system (destructive, outline, secondary) for cancel/confirm actions. Uses Tailwind with dark mode support and follows minimal flat design patterns.
